usage.h1: font-serif text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900
usage.label: font-sans text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500

gradients.hero_mesh: radial-gradient(at 0% 0%, hsla(215,90%,95%,1) 0, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(at 100% 0%, hsla(35,80%,95%,1) 0, transparent 50%)

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 font-medium px-6 py-2.5 rounded-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 font-medium px-6 py-2.5 rounded-md
buttons.accent: bg-amber-700 text-white hover:bg-amber-800 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 font-medium px-6 py-2.5 rounded-md
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 transition-all duration-200 font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-md

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
cards.interactive: group cursor-pointer bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg hover:border-slate-300 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: h-11 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:border-transparent transition-all duration-200

navigation.sidebar: w-64 bg-slate-900 text-slate-300 h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 border-r border-slate-800
navigation.sidebar_link: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-md transition-colors hover:text-white hover:bg-white/10
navigation.sidebar_link_active: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-md bg-white text-slate-900 font-medium shadow-sm

images.description: Professional lawyer workspace, light and modern
images.usage: Landing page hero background or feature section

images.description: Close up of signing legal document

images.usage: About section or background for quotes

sections: Hero: High trust, clean typography, 'Start for free' CTA
Features: 3-column grid highlighting AI generation, Chatbot, Storage
Trust: 'Trusted by 500+ Italian Law Firms' (social proof)
landing_page.visuals: Use 'hero_mesh' gradient background. Use 'hero_office' image with slight overlay.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar Layout + Bento Grid Mode B
dashboard.style: Clean white cards on slate-50 background. High density data but breathable padding.

document_generator.interaction: Step-by-step wizard or long-form intelligent inputs. Real-time preview if possible.

chat_assistant.style: Like ChatGPT but 'Legal Professional'. Message bubbles: User (Slate-100), AI (Slate-900 text-white).

universal_guidelines: Use 'Libre Baskerville' for all H1-H3 headings to establish legal authority.
Use 'Inter' for all UI text, inputs, and data.
Do NOT use gradients for buttons. Use solid Navy Blue (#0F172A).
Ensure all borders are subtle (slate-200), never harsh black.
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes.
For the 'Italian' feel, keep UI copy formal and elegant (even if in English for now, structure it for long words).
Never use pure black (#000000). Use Slate-950 (#020617) or Slate-900 (#0F172A).
